positive_cases.name: FILTER(ALL(Date)) instead of direct column filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-001: FILTER(ALL(dim)) wrapping a single equality condition — use direct column filter

positive_cases.name: LOOKUPVALUE with existing active relationship
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-002: LOOKUPVALUE used when RELATED is available and faster

positive_cases.name: SELECTEDVALUE without HASONEVALUE guard on multi-select slicer
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-003: SELECTEDVALUE returns blank when multiple regions selected

positive_cases.name: SWITCH overlapping conditions — broad before narrow
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-005: [Rev] > 1000 branch never reached because [Rev] > 0 matches first

positive_cases.name: EARLIER inside CALCULATE
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-006: EARLIER breaks inside CALCULATE
positive_cases.expected_fix: VAR CurrentDate = Sales[Date] RETURN CALCULATE(SUM(Sales[Amount]), Sales[Date] <= CurrentDate)

positive_cases.name: TOPN without tiebreaker
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-007: Tied values produce non-deterministic row selection

positive_cases.name: CONCATENATEX with no ORDERBY
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-008: Output order is non-deterministic

positive_cases.name: RANKX using ALL(FactTable)
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-009: Ranks globally, ignores slicer context

positive_cases.name: FORMAT wrapping a numeric measure used in aggregation
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-010: FORMAT returns text, breaks numeric aggregation and sort
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use Power BI format pane for number formatting

positive_cases.name: YEAR(TODAY()) in a measure
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-011: Hardcoded to evaluation year, stale between refreshes

positive_cases.name: TREATAS with mismatched column count
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-012: VALUES returns 2 columns but TREATAS target has 1

positive_cases.name: USERPRINCIPALNAME mixed case comparison
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-013: Mixed case email comparison silently excludes users

positive_cases.name: HASONEFILTER vs HASONEVALUE with bidirectional cross-filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-014: HASONEFILTER returns TRUE from cross-filter even when user selected nothing

positive_cases.name: CALENDAR start after end date
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-015: Produces zero rows, breaks all time intelligence

positive_cases.name: DATEDIFF on fact columns inside measure
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-016: DATEDIFF directly on fact columns in a measure, needs AVERAGEX wrapper

positive_cases.name: INT on negative margin
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-017: INT truncates toward zero, FLOOR toward negative infinity

positive_cases.name: CONTAINS argument order error
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-018: CONTAINS argument order is table, col, value — error-prone, use CONTAINSROW

positive_cases.name: Redundant BLANK() in IF false branch
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-019: IF false branch of BLANK() is default behavior — redundant

positive_cases.name: MAX on text InvoiceNumber
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-020: MAX on text returns alphabetical max, not numeric max
positive_cases.expected_fix: Convert InvoiceNumber to integer or use MAX on a date column

positive_cases.name: RELATED used directly in a measure body
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-021: RELATED requires row context, fails in measure

positive_cases.name: ISINSCOPE on non-hierarchy column
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-043: TransactionID never in hierarchy so always FALSE

positive_cases.name: USERNAME() in RLS filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-025: USERNAME() deprecated in Power BI Service

positive_cases.name: FORMAT inside SUMX
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-026: FORMAT per-row string conversion is expensive

positive_cases.name: SEARCH for case-sensitive match
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-027: SEARCH is case-insensitive, FIND is faster for exact case

positive_cases.name: SUBSTITUTE inside SUMX on large fact
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-028: String manipulation per row on fact table
positive_cases.expected_fix: Fix column type in Power Query, use SUM(Sales[Revenue])

positive_cases.name: COUNTROWS(ADDCOLUMNS(T,...))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-029: ADDCOLUMNS materializes extra column just to count rows

positive_cases.name: SELECTCOLUMNS inside SUMX extra columns
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-030: Extra columns materialized but not used

positive_cases.name: GENERATE inside measure
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-031: GENERATE full scan at query time

positive_cases.name: CONTAINS inside FILTER over fact
positive_cases.input: Match = CALCULATE([Rev], FILTER(Sales, CONTAINS(List, List[ID], Sales[CustID])))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-032: O(n*m) per-row membership test on fact

positive_cases.name: LOOKUPVALUE inside SUMX with existing relationship
positive_cases.input: Total = SUMX(Sales, Sales[Qty] * LOOKUPVALUE(Product[Margin], Product[PID], Sales[PID]))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-033: RELATED is 10-100x faster when relationship exists

positive_cases.name: UNION of two large facts inside measure
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-034: UNION materializes both tables at query time

positive_cases.name: EXCEPT for exclusion filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-035: EXCEPT materializes full set difference table

positive_cases.name: DISTINCTCOUNT on text composite key
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-036: Text DISTINCTCOUNT slower than integer

positive_cases.name: SUMMARIZE with explicit measures
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-037: SUMMARIZE with measure columns deprecated

positive_cases.name: ALL(FactTable) in RLS model
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-038: ALL(Sales) removes RLS filters

positive_cases.name: IF inside SUMX instead of CALCULATE filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-039: IF per-row is slower than CALCULATE with filter

positive_cases.name: ADDCOLUMNS+RANKX inside CALCULATETABLE
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-040: RANKX re-evaluates for every row O(n^2)
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use a measure-based rank or calculated column for static ranking

positive_cases.name: CROSSFILTER inside SUMX
positive_cases.input: BiRev = SUMX(Customer, CALCULATE([Rev], CROSSFILTER(Customer[ID], Sales[CID], BOTH)))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-041: CROSSFILTER applied on every iterator row

positive_cases.name: TOPN with large N on fact
positive_cases.input: T = SUMX(TOPN(5000, Sales, Sales[Amount], DESC), Sales[Amount])
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-042: TOPN 5000 on fact materializes large sort

positive_cases.name: DATEADD -365 DAY instead of SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-044: DATEADD DAY ignores leap years, SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR is correct

positive_cases.name: HASONEVALUE+SELECTEDVALUE redundant pattern
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-045: SELECTEDVALUE second argument handles the multi-value case

positive_cases.name: PARALLELPERIOD used for rolling window
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-046: PARALLELPERIOD shifts whole period, not a 30-day rolling window

positive_cases.name: Nested CALCULATE with no-op
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-023: Nested CALCULATE can be flattened

positive_cases.name: DATESYTD without year-end on fiscal year model
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-024: Missing year-end argument defaults to Dec 31 on fiscal year model

positive_cases.name: GENERATE+ROW virtual table
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-048: GENERATE+ROW overhead vs ADDCOLUMNS

positive_cases.name: Multiple OR conditions on same column
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-049: IN operator is faster than chained OR

positive_cases.name: DATESYTD on fact date column
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-050: Date argument from fact not from marked Date table

positive_cases.name: Fact table used as lookup dimension
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-051: Orders is a fact table, not a dimension

positive_cases.name: Calculated table used as fact table
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-052: Calculated tables refresh fully every time
positive_cases.expected_fix: Add Margin column in Power Query

positive_cases.name: Date table range ends before max fact date
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-053: Dates in 2024 will return blank from time intelligence

positive_cases.name: RLS on dimension with bidirectional to fact
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-054: Bidirectional filter leaks data between security roles
positive_cases.expected_fix: Apply RLS on fact table or change to single-direction relationship

positive_cases.name: TODAY() in calculated column
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-055: Calculated column frozen at refresh time

positive_cases.name: Hardcoded year in measure
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-056: Hardcoded year becomes wrong without change

positive_cases.name: Power Query step count > 20 on SQL source
positive_cases.input: N/A — M query with 25 applied steps against SQL Server
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-057: Query folding likely broken, full table loaded to memory
positive_cases.expected_fix: Consolidate steps, verify folding with View Native Query

positive_cases.name: List.Generate in Power Query on large source
positive_cases.input: N/A — M code: List.Generate(() => ...) against SQL DB
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-058: List.Generate never folds
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use SQL stored procedure or parameterized query instead

positive_cases.name: Binary image column loaded in Power Query
positive_cases.input: N/A — Power Query loads Product[ImageBinary] column
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-059: Binary columns inflate model size

positive_cases.name: Untyped Power Query parameter
positive_cases.input: N/A — StartDate parameter with no type annotation
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-060: Untyped parameter treated as text, breaks date filters

positive_cases.name: try...otherwise null hiding errors
positive_cases.input: N/A — [Amount] = try [RawAmount] otherwise null in Power Query
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-061: Data quality errors silently converted to null
positive_cases.expected_fix: Log errors to separate audit query

positive_cases.name: Measure with no description
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-062: No description metadata on measure

positive_cases.name: Column named Date or Filter
positive_cases.input: N/A — table column named 'Date' or table named 'Filter'
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-063: Reserved keyword as column name requires constant escaping
positive_cases.expected_fix: Rename to OrderDate or SalesFilter in Power Query

positive_cases.name: Relationship key is float/decimal
positive_cases.input: N/A — relationship on Decimal Number column OrderID
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-064: Float comparison failures cause missing rows
positive_cases.expected_fix: Change to Whole Number type in Power Query

positive_cases.name: Mixed case text relationship key
positive_cases.input: N/A — CustomerCode has mixed case across fact and dimension
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-065: Case-sensitive join mismatches lose rows
positive_cases.expected_fix: Text.Lower on both sides in Power Query

positive_cases.name: Duplicate rows in dimension table
positive_cases.input: N/A — DimCustomer has 2 rows with same CustomerID
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-066: Relationship becomes many-to-many, inflates totals

positive_cases.name: Two facts without shared dimension
positive_cases.input: N/A — FactSales and FactBudget relate to product through different keys
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-067: Cross-fact filtering fails without shared dimension
positive_cases.expected_fix: Create single DimProduct, relate both facts to it

positive_cases.name: DirectQuery report with no page filter
positive_cases.input: N/A — report page visual on DirectQuery 100M row table, no date filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-068: Full table scan on every visual load
positive_cases.expected_fix: Add default date slicer or filter in base measures

positive_cases.name: Bar chart with 300 axis members
positive_cases.input: N/A — bar chart with Product[SKU] axis, 300+ unique values
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-069: High cardinality axis breaks visual insight
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use Top N filter, show Other category for remainder

positive_cases.name: No display folders on 40+ measures
positive_cases.input: N/A — model has 40 measures in flat list
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-070: Measures not organized, self-service discovery broken
positive_cases.expected_fix: Organize into display folders: Revenue, Margin, Time Intelligence, KPIs

positive_cases.name: EARLIER in measure body
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-071: EARLIER only valid in calculated column row context
positive_cases.expected_fix: VAR Outer = MAX(Sales[Amount]) RETURN AVERAGEX(Sales, Sales[Amount] / Outer)

positive_cases.name: Multiple Excel sheets as separate queries
positive_cases.input: N/A — Sheet1, Sheet2, Sheet3 loaded as 3 separate queries with same schema
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-072: Separate queries increase refresh time and complexity

positive_cases.name: KEEPFILTERS(ALL(col))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-073: KEEPFILTERS(ALL()) is a no-op

positive_cases.name: RLS references table not in model
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-074: Manager table not loaded, role fails silently
positive_cases.expected_fix: Verify Manager table is loaded and related in the model

positive_cases.name: REMOVEFILTERS on full table in RLS model
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-075: REMOVEFILTERS(Sales) removes RLS filters

positive_cases.name: [sales] Sales Current Year Bad
positive_cases.input: Sales Current Year Bad = CALCULATE([Total Sales], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[Year] = YEAR(TODAY())))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-026: FILTER(ALL(dim)) for single equality — should use direct column filter

positive_cases.name: [sales] Sales Category Bad
positive_cases.input: Sales Category Bad = CALCULATE([Total Sales], FILTER(ALL(DimProduct), DimProduct[Category] = SELECTEDVALUE(DimProduct[Category])))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-002: SELECTEDVALUE without ISFILTERED guard — circular filter risk

positive_cases.name: [sales] Sales Rank Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-036: RANKX over entire fact table — should rank over dimension

positive_cases.name: [sales] Formatted Sales Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-008: FORMAT in aggregated measure returns text, not number

positive_cases.name: [sales] Sales This Year Bad
positive_cases.input: Sales This Year Bad = CALCULATE([Total Sales], DimDate[Year] = YEAR(TODAY()))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-009: YEAR(TODAY()) in measure recalculates at query time — use a slicer or parameter

positive_cases.name: [sales] modeling: Bidirectional relationship on DimTerritory
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-054: DimTerritory has bidirectional filter to FactSales — RLS on TerritoryKey leaks through to other dimensions
positive_cases.expected_fix: Set to single-directional; use CROSSFILTER in measures that need reverse filtering

positive_cases.name: [sales] modeling: FactSales used as dimension in report
positive_cases.input: FactSales used as dimension in report
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-051: SalesID placed on row axis of matrix — 5M rows returned to visual
positive_cases.expected_fix: Create DimOrder dimension or use aggregated measure in visual

positive_cases.name: [finance] Revenue Hardcoded Year Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-056: Hardcoded year literal — will be wrong next year

positive_cases.name: [finance] Department Summary Bad
positive_cases.input: Dept Summary Bad = SUMMARIZE(FactGL, DimCostCenter[Division], "Total", [Actual Amount])
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-042: SUMMARIZE with measures — use SUMMARIZECOLUMNS instead

positive_cases.name: [finance] FX Converted Bad
positive_cases.input: USD Amount Bad = SUMX(FactGL, FactGL[Amount] * LOOKUPVALUE(DimExchange[Rate], DimExchange[Currency], FactGL[Currency]))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-038: LOOKUPVALUE inside SUMX when a relationship could be used

positive_cases.name: [finance] modeling: DimBudget treated as dimension
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-052: DimBudget contains both budget rows and is related to DimAccount — many-to-many fan trap possible
positive_cases.expected_fix: Create a bridge table or use TREATAS to apply budget context

positive_cases.name: [saas] MRR Trend Bad
positive_cases.input: MRR Trend Bad = CALCULATE([MRR], DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -365, DAY))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-048: DATEADD with -365 days instead of SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR — misses leap years, slower

positive_cases.name: [saas] Churn Accounts Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-031: COUNTROWS(FILTER(fact, condition)) — use CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(), condition) instead

positive_cases.name: [saas] Top Plan Revenue Bad
positive_cases.input: Top Plan Revenue Bad = CALCULATE([MRR], TOPN(3, ALL(DimPlan), [MRR], DESC))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-006: TOPN without tiebreaker — plans with equal MRR have nondeterministic inclusion

positive_cases.name: [saas] modeling: FactUsage and FactSubscriptions both connected to DimAccount
positive_cases.input: FactUsage and FactSubscriptions both connected to DimAccount
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-063: Chained fact tables with shared dimension — cross-filtering may produce unexpected BLANK rows
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use TREATAS to apply account context across fact tables explicitly

positive_cases.name: [inventory] Inventory Text Value Bad
positive_cases.input: Inventory Text Bad = SUMX(FactInventory, FactInventory[OnHandQty] * FORMAT(FactInventory[UnitCost], "$#.00"))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-027: FORMAT inside SUMX converts to text — multiplication fails or causes type coercion

positive_cases.name: [inventory] Stock Search Bad
positive_cases.input: Product Search Bad = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactInventory), SEARCH("widget", DimProduct[ProductName], 1, 0) > 0)
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-028: SEARCH used where FIND would suffice for case-insensitive search; both are row-context evaluated

positive_cases.name: [inventory] modeling: Snapshot fact table summed without date filter
positive_cases.input: Snapshot fact table summed without date filter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-051: FactInventory is a periodic snapshot — summing OnHandQty without date filter multiplies values across all days
positive_cases.expected_fix: Always filter FactInventory to LASTDATE or a specific snapshot date in measures

positive_cases.name: [supply_chain] Late Days Bad
positive_cases.input: Late Days Bad = COUNTROWS(ADDCOLUMNS(FactShipments, "Late", FactShipments[ActualDeliveryDate] - FactShipments[PromisedDeliveryDate]))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-029: COUNTROWS(ADDCOLUMNS(fact)) — ADDCOLUMNS iterates all rows unnecessarily; use CALCULATE(COUNTROWS()) with filter

positive_cases.name: [supply_chain] Carrier List Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-007: CONCATENATEX without ORDERBY — carrier order is nondeterministic

positive_cases.name: [supply_chain] modeling: Role-playing DimLocation with inactive relationship for destination
positive_cases.input: Role-playing DimLocation with inactive relationship for destination
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-066: Only one relationship can be active — destination analysis requires USERELATIONSHIP in every measure
positive_cases.expected_fix: Create DimOrigin and DimDestination as separate views or calculated tables from DimLocation

positive_cases.name: [hr] Manager List Bad
positive_cases.input: Manager List = CONCATENATEX(FILTER(DimEmployee, DimEmployee[IsManager] = TRUE()), DimEmployee[FullName], ", ")
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-007: CONCATENATEX without ORDERBY — names appear in nondeterministic order

positive_cases.name: [hr] Salary Range Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-014: RELATED inside FILTER in measure context — RELATED only works in row context of the same table

positive_cases.name: [hr] User RLS Bad
positive_cases.input: My Dept Headcount = CALCULATE([Headcount], FILTER(DimDepartment, DimEmployee[ManagerKey] = LOOKUPVALUE(DimEmployee[EmployeeKey], DimEmployee[FullName], USERNAME())))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-011: USERNAME() deprecated in Power BI Service — use USERPRINCIPALNAME()

positive_cases.name: [hr] modeling: Salary stored in FactHeadcount snapshot
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-051: Summing salary across all months in the snapshot gives inflated total — salary is a semi-additive measure
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use LASTNONBLANK or filter to single month when calculating salary totals

positive_cases.name: [marketing] Campaign Rank Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-036: RANKX over fact table — should rank over DimChannel or aggregated table

positive_cases.name: [marketing] Channel Spend Formatted Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-008: FORMAT in measure returns text — cannot use in calculations or sort numerically

positive_cases.name: [marketing] Multi OR Filter Bad
positive_cases.input: Social Spend Bad = CALCULATE([CTR], DimChannel[Platform] = "Facebook" || DimChannel[Platform] = "Instagram" || DimChannel[Platform] = "Twitter" || DimChannel[Platform] = "TikTok")
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-043: Multiple OR conditions — use IN operator or VALUES() for better readability and potential optimization

positive_cases.name: [marketing] modeling: FactCampaigns and FactWebAnalytics both connected to DimChannel
positive_cases.input: FactCampaigns and FactWebAnalytics both connected to DimChannel
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-063: When filtering by channel, both fact tables filter — but campaign spend and web sessions may not have 1:1 granularity causing misaligned aggregations
positive_cases.expected_fix: Separate page-level visuals for campaign vs web metrics; avoid mixing fact tables in single visual

positive_cases.name: [operations] Asset Age Calc Column Bad
positive_cases.input: Asset Age Years = DATEDIFF(DimAsset[InstalledDate], TODAY(), YEAR)
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-055: TODAY() in calculated column — evaluated at refresh time, not at query time; stale between refreshes

positive_cases.name: [operations] Efficiency Text Bad
positive_cases.input: Efficiency Display Bad = CONCATENATEX(DimTechnician, DimTechnician[TechnicianName] & ": " & FORMAT([OEE], "0%"), UNICHAR(10))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-007: CONCATENATEX without ORDERBY and FORMAT in DAX context — nondeterministic order plus text type

positive_cases.name: [operations] Work Type Switch Bad
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-003: SWITCH with duplicate 'EM' condition — second EM branch is unreachable

positive_cases.name: [operations] modeling: FactDowntime with StartDateKey and EndDateKey
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-066: Two date foreign keys — only StartDateKey has an active relationship; filtering by month misses events that started in prior month
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use USERELATIONSHIP in measures for EndDateKey; or expand downtime into a daily snapshot table in Power Query

positive_cases.name: [pq] List.Generate for date range expansion
positive_cases.input: List.Generate(() => StartDate, each _ <= EndDate, each Date.AddDays(_, 1))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-058: List.Generate breaks query folding — executes in Power Query engine instead of being pushed to source
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use Table.AddColumn with Date arithmetic or use a SQL-side calendar table

positive_cases.name: [pq] Table.Buffer on large dataset
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-058: Table.Buffer forces evaluation in memory and breaks folding for all downstream steps
positive_cases.expected_fix: Remove Table.Buffer unless specifically needed to prevent re-evaluation of a random or time-sensitive source

positive_cases.name: [pq] try...otherwise null anti-pattern
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-060: Silently converts errors to null — hides data quality issues; nulls propagate silently through calculations
positive_cases.expected_fix: Use explicit type checks or Table.SelectRows to filter out bad rows; log errors separately

positive_cases.name: [pq] Untyped parameter
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-059: Parameter without explicit type — Power Query may infer wrong type, causing date arithmetic failures
positive_cases.expected_fix: Declare parameter with explicit type: Date.From(StartDate)

positive_cases.name: [pq] Excessive steps (>20) in a single query
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-057: More than 20 steps in one query makes the query hard to debug, slows the editor, and increases refresh memory usage
positive_cases.expected_fix: Split into staging queries: source → cleaned → transformed → final. Reference staging queries.

positive_cases.name: COUNTROWS(FILTER(fact, condition)) — slow pattern
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-069: COUNTROWS(FILTER(fact)) — use CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(), condition)

positive_cases.name: Multiple OR conditions — use IN operator
positive_cases.input: EU Sales = CALCULATE([Revenue], DimTerritory[Region] = "DE" || DimTerritory[Region] = "FR" || DimTerritory[Region] = "UK" || DimTerritory[Region] = "IT")
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-075: Four OR conditions on same column — use IN {"DE","FR","UK","IT"}

positive_cases.name: RANKX over fact table — should rank over dimension
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-077: RANKX over FactSales (5M rows) — rank over DimCustomer or DimProduct instead

positive_cases.name: SWITCH duplicate case value
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-078: 'P1' appears twice — second branch 'Urgent' can never be reached
positive_cases.expected_fix: Remove duplicate 'P1' branch; consolidate to single case value

positive_cases.name: TODAY() in calculated column — stale between refreshes
positive_cases.input: Days Since Hire = DATEDIFF(DimEmployee[HireDate], TODAY(), DAY)
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-079: TODAY() in calculated column is frozen at refresh — becomes stale immediately after
positive_cases.expected_fix: Move to a measure: Days Since Hire = DATEDIFF(MAX(DimEmployee[HireDate]), TODAY(), DAY)

positive_cases.name: DATEADD -365 DAY for prior year
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-074: DATEADD -365 DAY ignores leap years — use SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR

positive_cases.name: Hardcoded year 2023 in measure
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-076: Year literal 2023 — measure becomes wrong after 2023

positive_cases.name: LOOKUPVALUE inside SUMX when relationship exists
positive_cases.input: FX Amount = SUMX(FactGL, FactGL[Amount] * LOOKUPVALUE(DimExchange[Rate], DimExchange[Currency], FactGL[Currency]))
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-073: LOOKUPVALUE inside SUMX — add relationship and use RELATED instead

positive_cases.name: CONCATENATEX without ORDERBY — nondeterministic list
positive_cases.input: Manager Names = CONCATENATEX(FILTER(DimEmployee, DimEmployee[IsManager] = TRUE()), DimEmployee[FullName], ", ")
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-007: CONCATENATEX without ORDERBY — name order varies between queries
positive_cases.expected_fix: CONCATENATEX(FILTER(DimEmployee, DimEmployee[IsManager] = TRUE()), DimEmployee[FullName], ", ", DimEmployee[FullName], ASC)

negative_cases.name: Valid FILTER with complex multi-column condition
negative_cases.input: Margin = CALCULATE([Rev], FILTER(Sales, Sales[Qty] > 0 && Sales[Amount] / Sales[Qty] > 50))

negative_cases.name: Valid ALLSELECTED in visual market share measure
Valid TOPN with tiebreaker
negative_cases.input: Top5 = TOPN(5, VALUES(Customer[Name]), [Rev], DESC, Customer[Name], ASC)

negative_cases.name: Valid FORMAT for display-only text measure
Valid YEAR(TODAY()) in a label measure
Valid TREATAS with matching column counts
Valid CALENDAR with correct date order
Valid DATEDIFF in calculated column with VAR
Valid explicit BLANK() when averaging blank is intentional
Valid ALL on a specific column not a table
Valid nested CALCULATE with different tables
Valid GENERATE for date-product cross join in calculated table
Valid CROSSFILTER in dedicated bi-directional measure
Valid TOPN with small N on dimension for Top 5 visual
Valid HASONEVALUE guard on slicer value
Valid PARALLELPERIOD for same-month prior year
Valid SWITCH with VAR-cached branches

negative_cases.name: Correct CALCULATE with COUNTROWS and filter
Correct snapshot fact with LASTDATE
negative_cases.notes: Snapshot fact filtered to single date

negative_cases.name: Correct SWITCH with no duplicate cases

edge_cases.name: FILTER(ALL(Date)) for non-equality range condition — valid use
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-001 should NOT fire — multi-column range cannot be expressed as direct column filter without AND
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — this FILTER(ALL()) is justified for date range spanning two date values

edge_cases.name: SELECTEDVALUE on a single-select slicer — always has one value
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-003 may fire but is a false positive when slicer is locked to single-select
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed if slicer enforces single selection

edge_cases.name: FORMAT for currency symbol in a label only
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-010 should NOT fire when FORMAT result is used only in a text card or label visual
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix if result is not sorted or aggregated numerically

edge_cases.name: CONCATENATEX over a dimension with exactly 1 row
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-008 may flag missing ORDERBY but with 1 row output is deterministic
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed when cardinality is guaranteed to be 1

edge_cases.name: YEAR(TODAY()) in a purely cosmetic footer measure
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-011 should NOT fire — this is a cosmetic label, not time intelligence
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: CALCULATE with nested CALCULATE isolating filter context intentionally
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-023 may flag nested CALCULATE but inner REMOVEFILTERS() is intentional
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix — nested CALCULATE here serves a distinct purpose

edge_cases.name: ALLSELECTED in a report-level measure tested in DAX Studio
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-004: In DAX Studio ALLSELECTED behaves like ALL — result may surprise
edge_cases.expected_fix: Add ISINSCOPE guard: IF(ISINSCOPE(Product[Cat]), [measure], [alternative])

edge_cases.name: TOPN 1 — tiebreaker argument irrelevant when N=1 with unique measures
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-007 should NOT fire when business intent is MAX() not a stable sorted list
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix — tiebreaker is irrelevant for N=1 if measure values are unique

edge_cases.name: SUMMARIZE with groupBy only — no measure columns — valid
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-037 should NOT fire — no measure columns in SUMMARIZE
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: FILTER(ALL()) inside CALCULATE in a security measure intentionally
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-001 may flag but this is justified — multi-column filter on a fact column not a dimension
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix — cannot simplify to direct column filter here without re-testing

edge_cases.name: EARLIER in nested FILTER in a calculated column — valid
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-006 should NOT fire — EARLIER inside FILTER is valid in calculated column
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: DATEADD -1 YEAR on a non-standard calendar Date table
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-044 should NOT fire — DATEADD YEAR is correct for exact 1-year offset on standard calendar
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix if Date table is standard Gregorian calendar

edge_cases.name: BLANK() used as a sentinel for missing data in a classification column
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-019 should NOT fire — BLANK() here is intentional sentinel, not redundant
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: USERPRINCIPALNAME in DirectQuery RLS — lower normalization must be applied in source
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-013 should NOT fire — LOWER applied on both sides
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: COUNTROWS(ADDCOLUMNS(T, ...)) where extra column IS used in a filter downstream
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-029 should NOT fire — ADDCOLUMNS column is used in the downstream FILTER
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix — ADDCOLUMNS is necessary here

edge_cases.name: ALL(Table) in a table with no RLS defined
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-038 should NOT fire if no RLS is defined on the Sales table
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed when no security roles are present

edge_cases.name: LOOKUPVALUE for multi-key lookup with no matching relationship
edge_cases.input: Rate = LOOKUPVALUE(FX[Rate], FX[Currency], Sales[Currency], FX[Date], Sales[OrderDate])
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-002 should NOT fire — two-key LOOKUPVALUE cannot be replaced by RELATED on a single-column relationship
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix — multi-key LOOKUPVALUE is appropriate here

edge_cases.name: CONCATENATEX over empty table returns blank not error
edge_cases.input: EmptyList = CONCATENATEX(FILTER(Product, Product[Active] = 0), Product[Name], ", ", Product[Name], ASC)
edge_cases.expected_issue: No rule should fire — ORDERBY is correctly provided, empty result is expected behavior
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: MAX on a date column stored as text in ISO format
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-020 fires correctly — text MAX returns alphabetical not chronological max unless ISO format
edge_cases.expected_fix: Convert OrderDateText to Date type in Power Query, then use MAX(Orders[OrderDate])

edge_cases.name: CALENDAR end date using MAX(FactTable[Date]) when fact is empty in development
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-model-053 should NOT fire — this correctly uses fact table max date
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — this is the recommended pattern

edge_cases.name: DATESYTD on marked Date table with correct fiscal year end
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-024 should NOT fire — year-end argument correctly provided
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: HASONEFILTER on a column with no cross-filter relationships
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-014 should NOT fire when no bidirectional relationships exist for the table
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed in isolated star schema

edge_cases.name: Power Query step count > 20 on a non-foldable API source
edge_cases.input: N/A — 25 applied steps on a REST API connector
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-model-057 should be suppressed for non-relational sources where folding is never expected
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — source does not support folding

edge_cases.name: ISINSCOPE on a column that IS in a matrix hierarchy on the current report page
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-043 should NOT fire — City is in the matrix row hierarchy
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: RELATED in SUMX when relationship is inactive — RELATED returns blank silently
edge_cases.expected_issue: RELATED on an inactive relationship column returns blank — need USERELATIONSHIP or CALCULATE wrapper
edge_cases.expected_fix: SUMX(Sales, Sales[Qty] * CALCULATE(RELATED(Product[OldMargin]), USERELATIONSHIP(...)))

edge_cases.name: REMOVEFILTERS(Sales[Region]) in a report with no Region slicer — safe but harmless
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-model-075 should NOT fire — REMOVEFILTERS on specific column not on full table
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: SWITCH with BLANK() returning branches
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-005 should NOT fire — ISBLANK and [Rev] > 0 are non-overlapping conditions
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: Messy DAX whitespace and multi-line — engine still detects functions correctly
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-001: FILTER(ALL(Date)) with single equality — whitespace must not affect rule detection
edge_cases.expected_fix: CALCULATE(SUM(Sales[Amount]), 'Date'[Year] = 2024)

edge_cases.name: Valid GENERATE used in a calculated table for cartesian grid
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-031 should NOT fire for calculated table context, only for measure context
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — GENERATE in calculated table is valid

edge_cases.name: EARLIER used in nested SUMX within a calculated column
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-006 should NOT fire — EARLIER is inside FILTER inside SUMX, not directly in CALCULATE
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — EARLIER is valid in this row context

edge_cases.name: CALENDAR using CALENDARAUTO with fiscal end month
edge_cases.expected_issue: No rule should fire — CALENDARAUTO with month argument is the correct pattern
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: DISTINCTCOUNT on a high-cardinality integer column — valid performance
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-036 should NOT fire — this is an integer key column, recommended pattern
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: EXCEPT in a calculated table not a measure
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-035 should NOT fire for calculated table context
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: CONTAINS used with a single-column table expression — low risk
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-018 should flag — CONTAINSROW is cleaner but this is not incorrect
edge_cases.expected_fix: CONTAINSROW(VIPList, 42) — but low priority

edge_cases.name: ALLSELECTED used inside a tooltip visual — renders correctly
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-004 should NOT fire when tooltip visual provides visual context for ALLSELECTED
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed in tooltip visual context

edge_cases.name: SUMMARIZE with ROLLUP — valid and different from plain SUMMARIZE
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-037 should NOT fire — ROLLUP is valid and not a deprecated pattern
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: USERNAME() used in a model developed for Power BI Report Server not Service
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-025 should have reduced confidence for Report Server targets where USERNAME() is correct
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix if deployment target is Power BI Report Server (on-premises)

edge_cases.name: LOOKUPVALUE with multiple match keys — no equivalent RELATED
edge_cases.input: RateX = LOOKUPVALUE(FX[Rate], FX[FromCurrency], Sales[Currency], FX[ToCurrency], "USD", FX[RateDate], Sales[OrderDate])
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-002 should NOT fire — three-key lookup has no single-column RELATED equivalent
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: INT() on a column that is always non-negative by business rule
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-017 should NOT fire when column is guaranteed non-negative by business rule
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: HASONEVALUE used instead of SELECTEDVALUE in a cascading slicer measure
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-cor-003 should NOT fire — HASONEVALUE check with explicit 'Multiple Selected' label is valid pattern
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — this is a valid display pattern

edge_cases.name: TOPN used to limit rows for a report visual, not for aggregation
edge_cases.input: TopTable = TOPN(10, VALUES(Customer[Name]), [Rev], DESC, Customer[Name], ASC)
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-042 should NOT fire — N=10 is small and result is used as a visual table, not aggregated
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed

edge_cases.name: DATESYTD on fact date with no Date table and auto date/time disabled
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-050 fires correctly — even with auto date/time disabled, fact date in DATESYTD is wrong pattern
edge_cases.expected_fix: Create and mark a Date table, use DATESYTD('Date'[Date])

edge_cases.name: RELATED on a fact-to-fact relationship explicitly created for denormalization
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-model-051 fires — fact-to-fact RELATED is valid only if the relationship was intentionally modeled
edge_cases.expected_fix: Review model: if Shipments is truly a fact, extract ShipperName to a Shipper dimension

edge_cases.name: Power Query try...otherwise with explicit error table logging — valid suppression
edge_cases.input: N/A — try [Amount] otherwise null paired with Table.SelectRowsWithErrors audit query
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-model-061 should NOT fire when errors are captured in a parallel audit query
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed — error handling is documented and audited

edge_cases.name: REMOVEFILTERS on table with no RLS — safe grand total
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-model-075 fires but is only critical when RLS is defined on Sales
edge_cases.expected_fix: If no RLS: acceptable. If RLS exists: REMOVEFILTERS(Sales[Region]) instead

edge_cases.name: CALCULATE with FILTER on a small dimension table — performance acceptable
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-001 should NOT fire — multi-condition FILTER on dimension is necessary and not high cost
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix needed for small dimension tables

edge_cases.name: Messy real-world DAX with mixed indentation and long variable names
edge_cases.input:
Customer_Lifetime_Value_Measure =
VAR total_revenue_from_customer = CALCULATE ( SUM ( Sales[SalesAmount] ), ALL ( 'Date' ) )
VAR prior_year_revenue = CALCULATE ( SUM(Sales[SalesAmount]),   SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('Date'[Date]) )
RETURN
DIVIDE ( total_revenue_from_customer - prior_year_revenue , prior_year_revenue )
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule adv-perf-038 fires on ALL(Sales via 'Date') — actually ALL(Date) not ALL(Sales), should NOT fire
edge_cases.expected_fix: No fix — ALL is applied to the Date dimension not the fact table

edge_cases.name: SWITCH with empty string case
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-078: Empty string is a valid case value but often unintentional; verify data quality
edge_cases.expected_fix: Add data quality check; use ISBLANK() separately

edge_cases.name: DIVIDE result used as denominator without zero guard
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-003: Division by measure that can return BLANK or zero
edge_cases.expected_fix: Ratio = DIVIDE([Total Sales], [Conversion Rate])

edge_cases.name: DATESYTD on column from non-marked date table
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-050: Date argument from fact table, not from marked Date table — time intelligence may misbehave
edge_cases.expected_fix: CALCULATE([Revenue], DATESYTD('Date'[Date]))

edge_cases.name: ALLSELECTED produces ALL behavior when no slicer is active
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-004: ALLSELECTED returns ALL when called from DAX Studio or when no slicer exists
edge_cases.expected_fix: Add ISINSCOPE guard or document that behavior is expected in no-slicer context

edge_cases.name: Headcount summed across multiple snapshot months
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-067: Snapshot fact — summing salary across all months inflates by month count
edge_cases.expected_fix: HC Total = CALCULATE(SUM(FactHeadcount[Salary]), LASTDATE(DimDate[Date]))

edge_cases.name: CONCATENATEX over full fact table — may return truncated or blank result
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-007/adv-perf: CONCATENATEX over millions of rows will timeout or be truncated by Power BI
edge_cases.expected_fix: Limit with TOPN or aggregate before concatenating

edge_cases.name: Measure referencing inactive relationship without USERELATIONSHIP
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-model-066: DestinationKey→DimLocation is inactive; measure uses OriginKey relationship instead
edge_cases.expected_fix: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactShipments), USERELATIONSHIP(FactShipments[DestinationKey], DimLocation[LocationKey]))

edge_cases.name: RELATED called at measure top level — runtime error
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-072: RELATED requires row context — fails at measure top level
edge_cases.expected_fix: SUMX(FactSales, RELATED(DimProduct[Category]))  -- only if you need row-level iteration

edge_cases.name: USERNAME() in Power BI cloud RLS — returns empty in some tenants
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-cor-071: USERNAME() deprecated in Power BI Service
edge_cases.expected_fix: [RLS] = LOWER(DimEmployee[Email]) = LOWER(USERPRINCIPALNAME())

edge_cases.name: ALL(FactSales) removes RLS row-level security filters
edge_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-038: ALL on a fact table removes all filters including RLS — security bypass risk
edge_cases.expected_fix: CALCULATE([Revenue], REMOVEFILTERS(FactSales[Region]))

edge_cases.name: MonthName sorted alphabetically — visual shows Apr before Jan
edge_cases.input: // Line chart axis: DimDate[MonthName], values: [Total Sales]
edge_cases.expected_issue: visual: MonthName is text — sorts alphabetically (Apr, Aug, Dec...) not by month number
edge_cases.expected_fix: Sort MonthName by Month (integer) column in DimDate model view

edge_cases.name: MRR and ARR on same y-axis — MRR line invisible at scale
edge_cases.input: // Area chart: axis DimDate[Date], values [MRR] and [ARR]
edge_cases.expected_issue: visual: ARR = MRR * 12 — ARR dominates scale, MRR line appears flat at bottom
edge_cases.expected_fix: Put ARR on secondary axis or show in separate visual
